_instructions: 1. Kopiere diese Datei und benenne sie um (z.B. sovereign-action-stream-builder.json)

commit_message: feat(runtime): wire Sovereign action stream into builder
pr_title: feat(runtime): wire Sovereign action stream into builder
pr_body: Adds route-wide Sovereign Action Stream wiring so Repo, Worker, Code-LLM, OpenHands, GitHub access and blockers are visible through one runtime-backed chat stream.
